Prathap KM's 2026 Current Affairs Report

Collected from 01 Jan 2026 to 03 Jul 2026, 01:16 PM IST. This printable report is generated from the site's year-to-date archive and grouped by exam section.

1710 archive items
6 sections

How to read this handbook

  • Read the bold note as the one-line current affairs takeaway.
  • Use the exam hook to decide where it fits in KAS/UPSC notes.
  • Source names are kept for verification; raw links are placed quietly below each note.

Use the browser print dialog and choose "Save as PDF". This avoids paid services and keeps the site fully static.
